name: apprise-rmcp
description: Apprise RMCP server — universal push notification bridge for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Send alerts to Slack, Discord, PagerDuty, Telegram, email, and 80+ other services through the Apprise universal notification library. Supports tagged group delivery, stateless one-off URL notifications, and server health checks.
defaultPrompt: Send an alert to all configured Apprise notification services.
Notify the ops-alerts tag that a deployment completed successfully.
Check the Apprise notification server health status.
